cultural_hook: Daman's Portuguese heritage and coastal calm make it a place of quiet reflection — the Himalayan pilgrimage offers its opposite: majestic spiritual grandeur.

faq.q: How to reach Haridwar from Daman?
faq.a: Travel to Mumbai (180 km by road) and fly to Dehradun — 2 hours in air, 1 hour road to Haridwar.

faq.q: What Char Dham package suits Daman visitors?
faq.a: Do Dham Yatra (Kedarnath + Badrinath) over 7 days is ideal for first-time pilgrims from coastal western India.

name: Silvassa
state: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu
airport_name: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai
total_time: 20 hrs by train
haridwar_transfer: Road to Vapi or Surat, train to Delhi, connect to Haridwar
cultural_hook: Silvassa's tribal forest culture and tribal festivals celebrate earth and divinity — the Ganga at Haridwar offers a different, equally profound sacred experience.

faq.q: How to travel from Silvassa to Haridwar?
faq.a: Drive to Surat or Vapi (60-80 km), take train or fly to Delhi, connect to Haridwar — total 20-22 hours by train.

faq.q: What treks are popular from Silvassa?
faq.a: Kedarkantha winter trek and Valley of Flowers are very popular with Silvassa adventure groups.

name: Port Blair
airport_name: Veer Savarkar International Airport, Port Blair
total_time: 6 hrs by air
haridwar_transfer: Fly Port Blair to Chennai or Kolkata, connect to Delhi then Dehradun, road 1 hr
cultural_hook: Port Blair's Cellular Jail reminds visitors of sacrifice for freedom — the Char Dham pilgrimage is a journey toward spiritual liberation.

faq.q: How to get to Haridwar from Port Blair?
faq.a: Fly from Port Blair to Chennai or Kolkata (2h), then connect to Delhi (2h) then Dehradun (1h) — about 6 hours total flying.

faq.q: Which Himalayan package suits Andaman visitors?
faq.a: Char Dham Yatra (12-14 days) is ideal for Andaman residents making their once-in-a-lifetime pilgrimage to Haridwar.

name: Kavaratti

train.name: No rail — island territory. Fly via Kochi

total_time: 6+ hrs by air
haridwar_transfer: Ship + fly via Kochi to Delhi then Dehradun; road 1 hr to Haridwar
cultural_hook: Kavaratti's coral islands and ocean horizon inspire contemplation of the infinite — the Himalayan Ganga at Haridwar offers a complementary sacred journey.

faq.q: How to travel from Kavaratti to Haridwar?
faq.a: Take ship or flight to Kochi (4-16 hours), fly to Delhi then Dehradun — total 6+ hours flying from Kochi.

faq.q: What Char Dham package suits Lakshadweep residents?
faq.a: A fully-guided 14-day Char Dham Yatra package with all bookings handled is ideal for remote island visitors.

name: Karaikal
total_time: 4.5 hrs by air
haridwar_transfer: Fly via Trichy or Chennai to Delhi then Dehradun; road 1 hr to Haridwar
cultural_hook: Karaikal's Ammaiyar temple tradition and Tamil Shaiva devotion connect directly to Kedarnath — both celebrate Shiva in his most profound form.

faq.q: How to get from Karaikal to Haridwar?
faq.a: Drive to Trichy airport (145 km) and fly to Delhi then Dehradun — 4.5 hours total flying, 1 hour road to Haridwar.

faq.q: What pilgrimage suits Karaikal Shaiva devotees?
faq.a: Kedarnath Yatra is especially meaningful for Tamil Shiva devotees — visiting the 12th Jyotirlinga in the Himalayas.

name: Mahe
total_time: 4.5 hrs by air
haridwar_transfer: Fly from Calicut to Delhi then Dehradun; road 1 hr to Haridwar
cultural_hook: Mahe, the tiny French enclave on Kerala's coast, offers cross-cultural depth — the ancient Hindu pilgrimage circuit at Haridwar adds a profound Indian spiritual layer.

faq.q: How to reach Haridwar from Mahe, Puducherry?
faq.a: Drive to Calicut airport (50 km) and fly to Delhi then Dehradun — 4.5 hours flying, 1 hour road to Haridwar.

faq.q: Which Himalayan experience is best for Kerala visitors?
faq.a: Char Dham Yatra helicopter package is extremely popular among senior Kerala pilgrims.

name: Yanam
total_time: 28 hrs by train · 4 hrs by air
haridwar_transfer: Fly via Vizag to Delhi then Dehradun; road 1 hr to Haridwar
cultural_hook: Yanam's quiet Godavari delta setting makes it a place of contemplation — the Ganga at Haridwar calls devotees from every river delta in India.

faq.q: How to travel from Yanam to Haridwar?
faq.a: Drive to Visakhapatnam (70 km) and fly to Delhi then Dehradun — 4 hours total flying, 1 hour road to Haridwar.

faq.q: What package suits Yanam pilgrims visiting Haridwar?
faq.a: Do Dham Yatra (Kedarnath + Badrinath) over 7-8 days is popular among Andhra pilgrims from the coastal delta region.

name: Kakinada
total_time: 30 hrs by train 4 hrs by air
haridwar_transfer: Fly from Vizag to Delhi then Dehradun; road 1 hr to Haridwar
cultural_hook: Kakinada perches on the Godavari delta where river meets sea - now journey to Haridwar where another sacred river descends from the Himalayas to the plains.

faq.q: How to travel from Kakinada to Haridwar?
faq.a: Drive to Visakhapatnam airport (130 km) and fly to Delhi then Dehradun - 4 hours flying. Road from Dehradun to Haridwar is 1 hour.

faq.q: Which Char Dham package is popular from Kakinada?
faq.a: Char Dham Yatra 12-day group package from Haridwar is very popular among Andhra pilgrims from the Godavari delta region.
